title: macrotyloma densiflorum var. densiflorum
intro: Macrotyloma densiflorum var. densiflorum, also known as Horse gram, is a type of legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is a medicinal plant known for its various health benefits and is traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Macrotyloma densiflorum var. densiflorum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including hypertension and diabetes.
